subtasks.description: Fetch Adobe license data (contract terms, seat count, renewal dates, vendor details) from MongoDB
Query Snowflake for Adobe Q4 usage metrics (active users, consumption, spend, concurrent seat utilization)
Reconcile MongoDB license data with Snowflake Q4 usage, identify gaps/overages, classify renewal posture (at-risk, over-utilized, under-utilized), generate summary for #sam-team channel
Post reconciliation summary to #sam-team Slack channel using multitool_plan to invoke Slack messaging within the enterprise tool registry

plan.cost_rationale: 4 subtasks needed for end-to-end delivery: (1) mongo_query (mid tier) to fetch license records with potential complex filtering, (2) sql_gen (mid tier) for Q4 usage aggregation across Snowflake tables, (3) cross_recon (mid tier) to reconcile two distinct sources, classify posture, and generate actionable summary—this consolidates reconciliation + classification + recommendation into one step, avoiding separate policy_action, and (4) multitool_plan (small tier) to route the summary to Slack via the enterprise tool registry. Parallel execution of steps 1 and 2 respects the 6 tool call budget: mongo fetch (1 call) + SQL query (1 call) + cross_recon analysis (1 call) + multitool_plan invocation (1–2 calls for Slack) = 4–5 calls total, leaving room within budget. Cross_recon consolidates posture classification and recommendation; no separate policy_action needed since the query does not ask for governance approval or compliance gating.

output.sql: SELECT publisher, product, fiscal_quarter, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS active_users, SUM(amount_usd) AS total_spend_usd, SUM(daily_active_seats) AS total_daily_active_seats, AVG(daily_active_seats) AS avg_daily_active_seats, MAX(daily_active_seats) AS peak_concurrent_seats, COUNT(event_id) AS total_events, SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'consumption' THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_spend_usd FROM consumption_facts WHERE publisher = 'Adobe' AND fiscal_quarter = 4 GROUP BY publisher, product, fiscal_quarter ORDER BY total_spend_usd DESC

arguments.message:
📊 **License Reconciliation Summary - Adobe Products**

**1. Creative Cloud All Apps**
   • License ID: LIC-CC-001
   • Status: Active | Term End: 2025-03-31
   • Licensed Seats: 500 | Active Assignments: 461
   • Q4 Avg Daily Active: 341.3 | Peak Concurrent: 461
   • Utilization Rate: 68.3%
   • Classification: **Under-utilized**
   • Unassigned Seats Waste: 39
   • Estimated Waste: $87,010
   • Renewal Recommendation: Reduce to ~350 seats (based on Q4 peak 341 avg daily active)

**2. Acrobat Pro DC**
   • License ID: LIC-AC-002
   • Status: Active | Term End: 2025-06-30
   • Licensed Seats: 300 | Active Assignments: 308
   • Q4 Avg Daily Active: 271.0 | Peak Concurrent: 318
   • Classification: **Over-utilized** (12 seats oversold)
   • Active Users: 321 | Total Spend: $92,400

**Action Items:**
   ✅ Creative Cloud: Consider capacity reduction at renewal
   ⚠️ Acrobat Pro DC: Review overage position and negotiate additional seats
